issues.sample: During a road trip, the GV70 only having about 5000 miles, a Check Engine light came on. Cause of said warning was fuel injector malfunction. The car still operated normally. Took in to Dealer repair shop after getting back home from road trip and Dealer had car for over 5 weeks

This car had a lack of power since inception. The transmission had a horrible grinding sound during the upshift and down shifting of the transmission. Hyundai Corporation did replace the transmission but the grinding sound is not completely gone. The check engine light is current

narrative.headline: What 2022 Genesis Gv70 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 86 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Fuel/Propulsion System (28% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: During a road trip, the GV70 only having about 5000 miles, a Check Engine light came on. Cause of said warning was fuel injector malfunction. The car still operated normally. Took in to Dealer repair shop after getting back home from road trip and Dealer had car for over 5 weeks
issues.title: Fuel/Propulsion System
